text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading to my office when two<n>students
emerge from a nearby<n>classroom in an argument.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh! Leave me alone already! I<n>can't focus on
the race with you<n>nagging me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's cleaning time right now, so just<n>record your
little motorcycle race and<n>watch it later!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What's the point in watching if it's<n>not even live?!
You just don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I don't get it? I don't want to hearthat from someone who doesn'teven "get" why she should prioritizeher assigned tasks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! You... you're such a pain!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Why don't you just go find someonewho actually wants to clean?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Stop shirking your responsibilities!<n>Hey, come
back here! Ugh... I swear!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I later spot Vodka hanging out behind<n>the school,
watching a heated<n>motorcycle race on her phone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But as intense as the race sounds,<n>Vodka doesn't
look like she's<n>enjoying herself at all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Dammit! What's her problem?! This<n>sucks... Ugh!
choice_data_list: You don't look like you're having much fun.
You don't look like you're having much fun.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you were in the hallway earlier,<n>huh? Sorry you
had to see that.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...I can't stop thinking about what<n>Scarlet said.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I don't get it? I don't want to hearthat from someone who doesn'teven "get" why she should prioritizeher assigned tasks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
She's right... Skipping out on my<n>responsibilities
like that...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That was so uncool! Damn it all!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: She must be so done with me...
choice_data_list: You should show her how much you regret it!
You should apologize to her earnestly.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Guess it's that or bust!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The whole thing was my bad, and I<n>shouldn't
have been that rude to her!<n>I'm never gonna pull
such a lame<n>stunt again!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: At that very moment...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, fine. Get outta the way, will<n>you? I got trash
to throw out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet?! Did you hear what I was<n>saying?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Well, you were practically<n>yelling. So, you
were rude to a<n>particular someone?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And to whom exactly were yourude this time?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Guh... Don't give me that! Just hand<n>over that
garbage bag! I'll help clean!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm... So who were you talking<n>about again?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: C-come on, drop it already! You know<n>who!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I don't have the slightest idea.<n>I'm afraid I
won't "get it" until you<n>say it loud and clear for
me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! I'm not gonna say it! Youcan't make me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I don't know if I can do that... Nah,yeah. I've got no choice but toapologize, huh.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I won't run away! I'll apologize to her<n>and there'll
be no ifs, ands, or buts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: At that very moment...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Have you been here this whole time?<n>And what's
all this about apologizing<n>to someone?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! Perfect timing! U-um...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I ditched cleaning duty! I<n>was being
selfish, and...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's fine. Just do better fromnow on.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like you have to tell me! I'll make the<n>place so
clean you'll be able to see<n>your face on every
surface!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to get to work! You take<n>care of
wiping things down, and I'll<n>sweep the place.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Awfully bossy considering you were<n>neglecting
your duties not five<n>minutes ago...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what about that race you were<n>watching? Is
it over already?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's still going on, but now's not<n>the time to
be watching it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you're sounding very serious...<n>Are you
feeling all right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally fine! Just trying to take<n>responsibility
here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've got no business admiring cool<n>stuff while
acting majorly uncool!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see. So nothing's really<n>changed, then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You just take a backseat and leave it<n>all to me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Take this! And this, and this, and this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Vodka swings the broom about wildly,<n>whipping up
whirlwinds of dust.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Cough! Hack! Stop! Hey, I said quitit!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What are you playing at?! Did you<n>come back just
to make a mess?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All we gotta do is open the windows<n>and let the
dust blow out! Am I a<n>genius or what?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's the least intelligent idea I've<n>ever heard,
and the dust isn't even<n>going outside! Ugh, you're
just so—
choice_data_list: You two sure get along well.
You two sure get along well.

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No we don't!
